title: Journey Recruits
description: Shows the territories from the Recruits mod on JourneyMap
body:
# Journey Recruits

With this mod, faction claims from the Recruits mod are displayed directly on your JourneyMap. Now you can easily see territories of different factions right on the map!

## Main features

- Colored claim polygons grouped by faction
- Faction name shown in the center of each claim
- Configurable label scale, maximum zoom for names, and minimap support
